# Issue #199 fixture

This page is tagged with the Zettelkasten structure-note convention
`##structure`. Above the title the metadata template renders a tag
chip; here in the body the inline reference ###structure linkifies to
the same tag-index page. Both `href` attributes must percent-encode
the literal `#` so the browser does not truncate them into a fragment.
